tasks.subject: Task 1: Module Scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the module package with working build, typecheck, lint, and test runner.

**Files:** modules/module-iam/package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, eslint.config.js, src/ui/placeholder.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck exits 0
- pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test exits 0

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck && pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/package.json"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck && pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exits 0","test exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SQL Migrations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three migration files for module_iam schema, tables, and RLS.

**Files:** 0001_iam_schema.sql, 0002_iam_tables.sql, 0003_iam_rls.sql

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All three apply cleanly after packages/db migrations 0000-0003
- RLS FORCE-enabled on all four tables

**Verify:** `psql $DATABASE_ADMIN_URL -f 0001 -f 0002 -f 0003`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/migrations/0001_iam_schema.sql"],"verifyCommand":"psql $DATABASE_ADMIN_URL -f modules/module-iam/src/migrations/0001_iam_schema.sql","acceptanceCriteria":["All three migrations apply without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Drizzle Schema + DB Client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TypeScript Drizzle schema + IamDb factory.

**Files:** src/server/db/schema.ts, src/server/db/client.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- typecheck exits 0
- IamDb exported, createIamDb factory present

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/server/db/schema.ts","modules/module-iam/src/server/db/client.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Internal Helpers + Unit Tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** password-hash, session-token, crypto-compare, lockout + unit tests. No DB required.

**Files:** src/internal/*.ts, tests/credentials.test.ts, tests/sessions.test.ts (token unit tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All unit tests pass without TEST_DATABASE_URL
- hashPassword uses argon2id
- Lockout engages after threshold

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test -- --reporter=verbose`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/internal/password-hash.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test -- --reporter=verbose","acceptanceCriteria":["All unit tests pass","hashPassword uses argon2id","lockout engages after threshold"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Contracts (Zod schemas + types)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Zod schemas + types for all IAM I/O. SessionPublicView and SessionInternalView separated.

**Files:** src/contracts/login.ts, session.ts, invite.ts, password.ts, index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- typecheck exits 0
- SessionPublicView has no token/IP/revocation fields

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/contracts/session.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exits 0","SessionPublicView safe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Server Foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** constants, errors, context (IamServiceCtx), permissions, events (buildIamEnvelope).

**Files:** src/server/constants.ts, errors.ts, context.ts, permissions.ts, events.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- typecheck exits 0
- IamError is discriminated union (no message field)
- IamServiceCtx has systemDb: IamDb and tenantDb: SfosDb

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/server/context.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exits 0","IamError discriminated union"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Auth Service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** login, logout, validateSession with lockout enforcement, event emission, integration tests.

**Files:** src/server/api/auth.ts, tests/helpers.ts, tests/sessions.test.ts (integration)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- login valid creds → tokens
- login wrong pw → invalid_credentials
- 5 failures → account_locked
- validateSession expired/revoked/unknown → correct errors

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/sessions.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/server/api/auth.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/sessions.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["login returns tokens","lockout after 5 failures","validateSession works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Invitations Service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createInvitation, acceptInvitation (atomic+transactional), revokeInvitation.

**Files:** src/server/api/invitations.ts, tests/invitations.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Token stored as hash only
- acceptInvitation atomic via UPDATE…WHERE status='pending' RETURNING
- membership created via withTenantContext on tenantDb
- double-accept → invitation_already_accepted

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/invitations.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/server/api/invitations.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/invitations.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["atomic consume","membership via tenantDb","double-accept rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Sessions + Password Reset Services
tasks.description:
**Goal:** listSessions, revokeSession, revokeAllSessions, requestPasswordReset, consumePasswordReset.

**Files:** src/server/api/sessions.ts, src/server/api/password.ts, tests/password-reset.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- requestPasswordReset Ok(null) for unknown email
- consumePasswordReset SELECT FOR UPDATE atomic
- double-consume → reset_token_consumed

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/password-reset.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/server/api/password.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/password-reset.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["no user enumeration","atomic consume","double-consume rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Module Lifecycle + Manifest + Barrel + Docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ModuleLifecycle, manifest.ts, src/index.ts barrel, MODULE.md, OWNERSHIP.md.

**Files:** src/server/index.ts, src/index.ts, manifest.ts, MODULE.md, OWNERSHIP.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- typecheck + test both exit 0
- src/index.ts has no internal/ exports
- manifest validates against ManifestSchema
- preFlight returns Err when DATABASE_IAM_URL unset

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck && pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/src/index.ts","modules/module-iam/manifest.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @sfos/iam typecheck && pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exits 0","test exits 0","no internal exports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Adversarial Tests (MANDATORY)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Security tests — no user enumeration, brute-force lockout, cross-tenant bleed, race condition on invite accept, single-use token enforcement.

**Files:** tests/adversarial.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AUTH-1: unknown email = same error as wrong password
- AUTH-2: 5 failures → account_locked
- SESSION-1: revoked token → session_revoked
- INVITE-1: concurrent accept — exactly 1 wins
- RESET-1: double-consume → reset_token_consumed

**Verify:** `TEST_DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/adversarial.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`

```json:metadata
{"files":["modules/module-iam/tests/adversarial.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"TEST_DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL pnpm --filter @sfos/iam test tests/adversarial.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose","acceptanceCriteria":["No user enumeration","Brute-force lockout","Revoked session denied","Race condition handled","Double-consume denied"]}
```
